categories.title: Recent Pull Requests in elizaOS/eliza Repository

content.text: Several pull requests have been merged into the elizaOS/eliza repository, focusing on documentation improvements and bug fixes. PR #4281 by madjin updated the documentation, while PR #4322 by leopardracer fixed typos and improved the changelog documentation. PR #4321 by zeroprooff removed a duplicate Dutch README file (README_NL.md). On the technical side, PR #4261 by Samarthsinghal28 added instrumentation functionality, and PR #4324 by Y4NK33420 fixed an issue with attachment handling.

Several documentation improvements and maintenance updates were made to the Eliza project:

- Added instrumentation functionality (PR #4261)
- Updated documentation (PR #4281)
- Removed a duplicate Dutch README file (PR #4321)
- Fixed typos and improved the changelog documentation (PR #4322)

These changes help maintain code quality and improve the project's documentation for users and contributors.

Current cryptocurrency prices:

- Wrapped Ethereum (WETH): $1,588.73
- Solana (SOL): $134.04

These prices reflect the current trading values of two major cryptocurrencies in the market.

Between April 19-20, 2025, the elizaos/eliza repository showed moderate activity with 1 new pull request and 4 merged PRs. The repository had no new issues reported during this period. There were 12 active contributors working on the project during this timeframe.
sources: text: From 2025-04-19 to 2025-04-20, elizaos/eliza had 1 new PRs (4 merged), 0 new issues, and 12 active contributors.
